en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO THE GITTITH. A PSALM OF THE SONS OF KORAH. How lovely is your dwelling place, O LORD of hosts!
zh: 萬軍之耶和華啊！ 你的居所多麼可愛。

en: My soul longs, yes, faints for the courts of the LORD; my heart and flesh sing for joy to the living God.
zh: 我的靈渴想切慕耶和華的院子， 我的心身向永活的 神歡呼。

en: Even the sparrow finds a home, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young, at your altars, O LORD of hosts, my King and my God.
zh: 萬軍之耶和華，我的王我的 神啊！ 在你的祭壇那裡， 麻雀找到了住處， 燕子也為自己找到了安置幼雛的巢。

en: Blessed are those who dwell in your house, ever singing your praise! Selah
zh: 住在你殿中的，都是有福的， 他們還要不斷讚美你。

en: Blessed are those whose strength is in you, in whose heart are the highways to Zion.
zh: 靠你有力量，心中嚮往通到聖殿大道的， 這人是有福的。

en: As they go through the Valley of Baca they make it a place of springs; the early rain also covers it with pools.
zh: 他們經過乾旱的山谷， 使這谷變為泉源之地， 更有秋雨使這谷到處都是水池。

en: They go from strength to strength; each one appears before God in Zion.
zh: 他們行走，力上加力， 直到各人在錫安朝見 神。

en: O LORD God of hosts, hear my prayer; give ear, O God of Jacob! Selah
zh: 耶和華萬軍的 神啊！ 求你聽我的禱告； 雅各的 神啊！ 求你留心聽。

en: Behold our shield, O God; look on the face of your anointed!
zh: 神啊！求你垂顧我們的盾牌， 求你看顧你的受膏者。

en: For a day in your courts is better than a thousand elsewhere. I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God than dwell in the tents of wickedness.
zh: 在你院子裡住一日， 勝過在別處住千日； 寧願站在我 神殿中的門檻上， 也不願住在惡人的帳棚裡。

en: For the LORD God is a sun and shield; the LORD bestows favor and honor. No good thing does he withhold from those who walk uprightly.
zh: 因為耶和華 神是太陽，是盾牌， 耶和華賜下恩惠和光榮； 他沒有留下一樣好處， 不給那些行為正直的人。

en: O LORD of hosts, blessed is the one who trusts in you!
zh: 萬軍之耶和華啊！ 倚靠你的人是有福的。
